'''wasana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moaning|moaning]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moaning|moaning]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wasana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæsænæth|wæsænæth]] || [[word:wæsænæj|wæsænæj]] || [[word:wæsænæsh|wæsænæsh]] || [[word:wæsænæ|wæsænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wasasanath|wasasanath]] || [[word:wasasanaj|wasasanaj]] || [[word:wasasanash|wasasanash]] || [[word:wasasana|wasasana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wasanath|wasanath]] || [[word:wasanaj|wasanaj]] || [[word:wasanash|wasanash]] || [[word:wasana|wasana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wasafnath|wasafnath]] || [[word:wasafnaj|wasafnaj]] || [[word:wasafnash|wasafnash]] || [[word:wasafnaf|wasafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wasanatha|wasanatha]] || [[word:wasanaja|wasanaja]] || [[word:wasanasha|wasanasha]] || [[word:wasanaka|wasanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wasanath|wasanath]] || [[word:wasanaj|wasanaj]] || [[word:wasanash|wasanash]] || [[word:wasana|wasana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wasanathal|wasanathal]] || [[word:wasanajal|wasanajal]] || [[word:wasanashal|wasanashal]] || [[word:wasanakal|wasanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wasanathatha|wasanathatha]] || [[word:wasanajaja|wasanajaja]] || [[word:wasanashasha|wasanashasha]] || [[word:wasanaka|wasanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wasanathan|wasanathan]] || [[word:wasanajan|wasanajan]] || [[word:wasanashan|wasanashan]] || [[word:wasanakan|wasanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wasanathaoro|wasanathaoro]] || [[word:wasanajaoro|wasanajaoro]] || [[word:wasanashaoro|wasanashaoro]] || [[word:wasanakaoro|wasanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
